languages.text: {n}Перед вами древний {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g}, являющий собой настоящее произведение искусства. Повинуясь вашим командам, его машинный дух пробуждается, испуская негромкий приветственный гул.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Перед вами — произведение искусства, а не просто {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g}. И при том — древний. Что лишь означает, что живущий в нем {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинный дух{/g} стар, мудр и верен.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Перед вами древний {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g}, являющий собой настоящее произведение искусства. Повинуясь вашим командам, его машинный дух пробуждается, испуская негромкий приветственный гул.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} in front of you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}
{n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} in front of you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}
{n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}
{n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你面前这台古老的{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}堪称真正的艺术品。在你的指令下，它的机魂苏醒过来，发出一声轻柔的嗡鸣，像是在向你致意。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你面前这台古老的{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}堪称真正的艺术品。在你的指令下，它的机魂苏醒过来，发出一声轻柔的嗡鸣，像是在向你致意。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g} antiguo que tienes delante es una verdadera obra de arte. Su espíritu máquina obedece tus órdenes y despierta con un zumbido a modo de saludo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g} antiguo que tienes delante es una verdadera obra de arte. Su espíritu máquina obedece tus órdenes y despierta con un zumbido a modo de saludo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'antique {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g} devant vous est une véritable œuvre d'art. Obéissant à vos ordres, l'esprit de la machine s'éveille, vous saluant d'un léger ronronnement.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'antique {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g} devant vous est une véritable œuvre d'art. Obéissant à vos ordres, l'esprit de la machine s'éveille, vous saluant d'un léger ronronnement.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Önündeki kadim {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayar{/g}, gerçek bir sanat eseri. Komutlarına itaat eden makine ruhu, yumuşak bir selamlama vızıltısıyla uyanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Önündeki kadim {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayar{/g}, gerçek bir sanat eseri. Komutlarına itaat eden makine ruhu, yumuşak bir selamlama vızıltısıyla uyanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der alte {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitator{/g} vor dir ist ein echtes Kunstwerk. Der Maschinengeist gehorcht deinen Befehlen und erwacht mit einem grüßenden Summen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der alte {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitator{/g} vor dir ist ein echtes Kunstwerk. Der Maschinengeist gehorcht deinen Befehlen und erwacht mit einem grüßenden Summen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの前にある古の{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}コギテーター{/g}は、まさに芸術品だ。あなたの命令に従い、その機械精霊が、柔らかな唸りの挨拶とともに目覚める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの前にある古の{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}コギテーター{/g}は、まさに芸術品だ。あなたの命令に従い、その機械精霊が、柔らかな唸りの挨拶とともに目覚める。{/n}
